description_long: This guard rail consists of two parallel horizontal rails supported by two vertical posts at each end, forming a simple and sturdy linear barrier. The rails and posts are constructed from a dark, metallic material, likely steel, with a matte finish that reduces glare. The ends of the rails are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or energy-absorbing features. The cross-section of the rails appears rectangular, providing a solid and robust profile. There are no visible reflective markings or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The overall structure is compact and functional, suitable for use along urban streets, parking lots, or pathways to prevent vehicles or pedestrians from crossing certain boundaries.
description: A dark, metallic guard rail with two parallel rectangular rails and two sturdy vertical posts, featuring a simple, utilitarian design with blunt ends and no reflective markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both horizontal rails and the two supporting posts, highlighting the full width and structure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the rails and posts, with minimal depth visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the parallel rails and posts from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the rails and posts.
